full_suite.failure_notes: The requested spelling `MPLBACKEND=Agg .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/racketsport tests/server -x-NEVER` exits before collection with pytest error `argument -x/--exitfirst: ignored explicit argument '-NEVER'`, so the full no-fail-fast census was run without that invalid token. The six failures are the three court_keypoint_review_server token/page tests and the three review_input_server token/page tests; every traceback fails before test logic at socket.bind(('127.0.0.1', 0)) with PermissionError [Errno 1] Operation not permitted. Direct socket probe also returns PermissionError. Clean HEAD archive replay under /private/tmp/pickleball_head_beststack_core_20260708_headcopy reproduced the same six failures in 0.64s.

honest_issues: The wide suite is not green in this sandbox because localhost socket binding is prohibited, but the failing tests are proven pre-existing at clean HEAD and unrelated to this lane.

There was no dedicated stored no-flag fixture-hash file/test in this checkout; I preserved the contract through deterministic stage/default assertions, the required rationale line, and a focused contact-dense frame-plan test.
FOV manifest path is repaired and fail-loud behavior is tested, but the moge_2_vitl_normal checkpoint file is still absent locally; this lane did not download model weights.
audit_storage_policy.py still reports unrelated/pre-existing storage-policy dirt from generated cache dirs and existing large untracked fixture/source exceptions; I did not claim the tree is clean.
No labels, heldout_eval_ledger.md, fenced court files, web/replay, ios, gate thresholds, or gated metric keys were touched.
